description: Unlinked public review build of the Audio Jacobian Lens, with full cached explorers as the primary routes and curated experiment findings as secondary interpretation pages.
interaction_boundary: The primary pages provide static sample selection, cleared-input playback, synchronized waveform/token/layer selection, cell-local hover and keyboard detail, cached candidate inspection, ASR character-length reranking, readable banded speech-token matrices with natural-EOS versus safety-cap status, TTS text diagnostics, and recorded intervention inspection. Findings pages explain the curated experiments. No model inference, upload, recording, generation, or intervention endpoint is present.
media_policy: Only the ten CC BY 4.0 LibriSpeech input FLACs are included. Generated LFM and Chatterbox audio remains excluded pending derived-output review.
payload_policy: Each detailed family manifest pins model/lens provenance and hashes ten reduced reports. ASR character-length buckets are separate, hash-pinned files loaded only when the filter is enabled. Ephemeral server IDs and embedded audio are excluded.
